prompt:
{
  "type": "2x2 advertisement banner grid",
  "layout": "four distinct quadrants, each containing a different style of commercial advertisement",
  "quadrants": [
    {
      "position": "top-left",
      "industry": "skincare and beauty",
      "visuals": "close-up portrait of a young Asian woman with clear, glowing skin touching her cheek; a sleek serum bottle with a glowing pearl-like sphere next to it",
      "brand": "LUMIèRE",
      "copy": [
        "{argument name=\"beauty catchphrase\" default=\"わたし史上、いちばんの透明感へ。\"}",
        "うるおい×ハリ透明感 トータルエイジングケア美容液",
        "2024.4.20 NEW DEBUT"
      ],
      "color_palette": "white, soft beige, light grey"
    },
    {
      "position": "top-right",
      "industry": "travel agency",
      "visuals": "a backpacker standing on a rocky cliff overlooking a stunning blue fjord and majestic mountains under a clear sky",
      "brand": "TABINOVA",
      "copy": [
        "{argument name=\"travel catchphrase\" default=\"まだ見ぬ景色を探しに行こう。\"}",
        "今こそ旅に出よう",
        "国内・海外ツアーは最大30%OFF!",
        "5.31まで"
      ],
      "color_palette": "sky blue, deep ocean blue, earthy greens and browns"
    },
    {
      "position": "bottom-left",
      "industry": "cafe and dining",
      "visuals": "a mouth-watering stack of fluffy pancakes topped with melting butter, dripping syrup, fresh strawberries, and blueberries; a cup of black coffee and a silver fork in the background",
      "brand": "café miel",
      "copy": [
        "{argument name=\"cafe catchphrase\" default=\"しあわせは、今日のごほうび。\"}",
        "ふわっと、とろけるパンケーキで 心ほどけるカフェタイムを。",
        "季節限定 ベリーパンケーキ 1,480 yen",
        "Follow us! @cafe_miel_official"
      ],
      "color_palette": "warm beige, appetizing brown, vibrant red"
    },
    {
      "position": "bottom-right",
      "industry": "B2B SaaS / AI technology",
      "visuals": "isometric 3D illustration featuring miniature office workers interacting with floating data dashboards, bar charts, and a central AI server unit; 3 circular feature icons at the bottom left",
      "brand": "{argument name=\"tech brand name\" default=\"SHIFTAI\"}",
      "copy": [
        "{argument name=\"tech catchphrase\" default=\"その仕事、AIにおまかせ。\"}",
        "業務効率を、次のステージへ。",
        "無料相談受付中！",
        "詳しくはこちら"
      ],
      "color_palette": "corporate blue, purple gradient, crisp white"
    }
  ]
}

breakdown.creativeCore: 4-Panel Japanese Advertising Banner Grid：Generates a 2x2 grid of distinct commercial advertisement banners for skincare, travel, food, and tech industries, useful for marketing mockups.
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: B2B 产品概念图、后台系统、数据看板

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, isometric, grid, 2x2]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: 3d, isometric]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
